scripts.install-all: npm --prefix customer-master install && npm --prefix design1 install && npm --prefix design2 install && npm --prefix design3 install && npm --prefix design4 install
scripts.build-all: npm --prefix customer-master run build && npm --prefix design1 run build && npm --prefix design2 run build && npm --prefix design3 run build && npm --prefix design4 run build
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-all && node build.js
